form.formComment: Won two starts back over 457m at this track. Last start he finished 2nd in a Free For All on April 11 over 457m at this track behind Fire Me Up beaten 5 lengths (25.33). Draw likely to suit. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

form.formComment: Was the fastest winner on the program after running them ragged to make it two on end at this track over 457m (25.00). With a clean break will feature again.

form.formComment: Has recorded back to back wins. Scored most recently over 457m at this track in Mix 5 class a week ago. Can't make much of a case this time.

form.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by one length at this track over 457m (25.69) beating Comical Warren in Mix 5 on April 11. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Grafton (26.09) in a NG, finishing a 14 length eighth. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and five places from 11 starts. Looking to others.
